notes_for_human_reviewer: Ceiling submission. All five variables fully addressed with current state, evidence, absorption analysis, and downstream cost. Scope disambiguation explicit across all three senses (documented, in-practice, sponsor's mental model) — recommends a sponsor conversation as the chapter prescribes. Silent cuts surfaced with quoted evidence and quantified consequences. Risk envelope assessment is the chapter's exact framing. Three trade-offs made explicit with structure: short-term win, long-term cost. Closeout-items recommendation links current choices to organisational learning. Closes with role-discipline statement ('I am not proposing to escalate to sponsor directly'). Top of the rubric — exactly what we want every learner producing.
